title: Board items
excerpt: I have an employee workspace with a “training log” board and mgmt workspace with a board having a group for each employee. Items need to simultaneously be added/updated. How do I make this happen?

posts.author: CJNS (Christina Numera-Segreti)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an employee workspace with a “training log” board and mgmt workspace with a board having a group for each employee. Items need to simultaneously be added/updated. How do I make this happen?
